text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #24)
Sorry for late reply.

> Would you like add pandoc to DOCS_RUN_DEPENDS? And for testing, devel/bats-> core (IMHO should work instead of bats).

Hmm, i'll work about it. What about adding pandoc as build dependency for DOCS option, i think it would be more appropriate. Thanks for recommending a program for testing.

I'm afraid that pandoc requires lang/ghc which i doubt it would have some long build time but let's see.
